home.title: Pizza Project | Takeaway & Delivery Pizza
home.description: Pizza Project – freshly baked pizza for takeaway and delivery. Fast ordering, quality ingredients, and great taste. Order now!

cart.title: Pizza Project | Order Cart
cart.description: Your order cart at Pizza Project. Review your pizzas, quantities, and prices, then proceed to checkout and delivery.

deliveryPricing.title: Pizza Project | Delivery pricing
deliveryPricing.description: Delivery pricing by zones for Pizza Project. Find your zone and delivery fee.

randomOrder.title: Pizza Project | Random order
randomOrder.description: Let chance decide — choose quantity and size, roll the dice, and add randomly selected pizzas to your cart.

slides.title: Accademia Pizzaoli
slides.text: One of the most well-known schools for mastering the art of pizza. We believe investing in knowledge is always the safest investment.

slides.title: How it started
slides.text: When we look at these photos, we almost feel it in our stomachs... remembering all the renovations, contractors, and headaches wasn’t exactly fun — but looking back now, we know it was worth it.

slides.title: Every pizza has a story
slides.text: And when I remember she almost wanted to hit me with a shovel at the beginning... 😊 Patience, support, and love for what we do can be tasted in every pizza and sandwich you eat. As for drinks — no secrets there, we buy those.

delivery.onlyDrinks: Drinks only delivery is not possible.
delivery.needLargePizza: At least one 32 cm or 50 cm pizza is required for delivery.
delivery.forbiddenItems: We do not deliver small pizzas (24 cm) and sandwiches.
delivery.allowed: Shipping is available for the contents of the basket.

form.deliveryOk: Delivery is available for your cart.
form.deliveryNotOkFallback: Delivery is not available for your cart.
form.cashOnly: We accept cash only for delivery.
form.consent: By submitting the order, you confirm the information is accurate and you consent to the processing of personal data.
form.restaurantClosed: The restaurant is currently closed. Ordering is unavailable.

deliveryPricing.subtitle: Find your zone and delivery fee.

pending.title: Waiting for confirmation…
pending.text: The restaurant needs to accept or reject your order. This usually takes a moment.
pending.trackingHint: You can close this window and keep browsing — tracking will stay active.

accepted.title: Order accepted
accepted.thanks: Thanks for your trust! We’re preparing your order.

rejected.title: Order rejected
rejected.noReason: No reason provided. Please try again or choose pickup.
